articles.title: Grab a 1440p-capable gaming rig with an RTX 5060 for just $1,049 — Save up to 25% on ABS Flux & Cyclone prebuilts that also feature 32 GB of RAM
articles.summary: Building a PC has its advantages, such as cheaper parts costs and a learning experience that'll stick with you forever. However, when our AI overlords suck the joy out of DIY custom rigs, we need to venture out to find good deals in such turbulent times, and these prebuilts from ABS provide exactly that.
articles.title_zh: 購買配備 RTX 5060 的 1440p 遊戲電腦，僅需 $1,049 — ABS Flux & Cyclone 預組裝機節省高達 25%，另配 32 GB RAM
articles.summary_zh: 自組 PC 雖有成本優勢和學習價值，但 ABS 的預組裝機在當前市場環境中提供了絕佳的交易機會。

articles.title: This must-have miniature Macintosh retro dock gives your M4 Mac Mini a 1980s makeover — equipped with a 5-inch HD display and M.2 NVMe SSD slot
articles.summary: The Wokyis M5 Retro Dock Station will add USB ports, memory card readers, and an external SSD enclosure to your Mac mini while giving you a small '80s Macintosh on your desk.
articles.title_zh: 必備迷你 Macintosh 復古擴展塢為您的 M4 Mac Mini 打造 1980 年代風格 — 配備 5 英寸 HD 顯示屏和 M.2 NVMe SSD 插槽
articles.summary_zh: Wokyis M5 Retro Dock Station 為 Mac mini 增添 USB 連接埠、記憶卡讀卡機和外部 SSD 外殼，同時在桌面上呈現懷舊的 80 年代 Macintosh 風貌。

articles.title: Sony increases prices for refurbished PS5 slims by $100 — PS5 Fortnite bundle is out of stock, marking the end of new $399 consoles
articles.summary: Sony increased prices for refurbished PlayStation 5 Slim consoles, following its move last month to make brand-new models more expensive.
articles.title_zh: Sony 將翻新 PS5 Slim 主機價格上漲 $100 — PS5 Fortnite 套裝缺貨，標誌著 $399 新主機時代的終結
articles.summary_zh: Sony 上調翻新 PlayStation 5 Slim 主機價格，延續上月調漲全新機型價格的舉措。

articles.title: Potential Route To Photonic FPCA Using NV Low-Loss Phase Change Material (Oxford)
articles.summary: A new technical paper, “Nonvolatile photonic field-programmable coupler array,” was published by researchers at University of Oxford. Abstract “Programmable photonic networks carry out universal unitary functions by independently operating on the amplitude and phase of guided light. Exploiting the reconfigurability and spatiospectral degrees of freedom of these systems, the majority of state-of-the-art photonics applications, ranging from microwave photonics to photonic computing and optical communication links, can be demonstrated in one unified system. Existing techniques require a large footprint due to weak modulation efficiency, and continuous power dissipation to maintain the configured state. Here, we demonstrate a programmable recirculating mesh unit cell based on
articles.title_zh: 使用 NV 低損耗相變材料的光子 FPGA 潛在路線（牛津大學）
articles.summary_zh: 牛津大學研究人員發表新論文《非揮發性光子現場可編程耦合器陣列》，探討可程式化光子網路通過獨立操作引導光的振幅和相位來執行通用單位函數的方法。

articles.title: Google Is A Full Stack AI Player, And Is Playing Well
articles.title_zh: Google 是完整的 AI 全棧玩家，且表現出色

articles.title: Indie App Spotlight: ‘This Day’ turns photo cleanup into a simple daily habit
articles.summary: Welcome to Indie App Spotlight . This is a weekly 9to5Mac series where we showcase the latest apps in the indie app world. If you’re a developer and would like your app featured, get in contact . Everyone probably has a massive photo library going back for years, maybe even over a decade. Over time, that consumes more and more storage – and this becomes a problem, especially if you’re paying for iCloud storage. On the other hand, decluttering isn’t easy. This Day turns photo decluttering into a habit, by designing an interface that allows you to address it one day at a time. more…
articles.title_zh: 獨立應用聚焦：'This Day' 將照片清理變成簡單的日常習慣
articles.summary_zh: 這是 9to5Mac 每週展示獨立應用世界最新應用的系列專題。大多數人都有龐大的照片庫，可能已有多年甚至十多年的歷史。

articles.title: Limited-time Apple Card promo offers $100 Bonus Daily Cash when you add a co-owner
articles.summary: Apple Card has been throwing around loads of limited-time sign up offers lately , but those only help new customers – not existing ones. This new offer, however, benefits existing Apple Card users. Through May 18th, Apple Card users can add a co-owner to their account and get $100 in Daily Cash after the new co-owner spends $100 in their first 30 days. more…
articles.title_zh: 限時 Apple Card 優惠：添加共同所有人時獲得 $100 日常現金獎勵
articles.summary_zh: Apple Card 最近推出了許多限時註冊優惠，但這些只惠及新客戶。這項新優惠則惠及現有 Apple Card 用戶，他們可在 5 月 18 日之前添加共同所有人並獲得 $100 日常現金。

articles.title: xAI is bringing Grok Voice mode to Apple CarPlay
articles.summary: Apple CarPlay recently gained support for AI chatbots, and the third app to add support is coming soon: Grok. more…
articles.title_zh: xAI 正將 Grok 語音模式帶到 Apple CarPlay
articles.summary_zh: Apple CarPlay 近期獲得了對 AI 聊天機器人的支持，Grok 將成為第三個添加支持的應用。

articles.title: Apple @ Work: Unpacking the top mobile threats facing your Apple fleet this year
articles.summary: Apple @ Work is exclusively brought to you by Mosyle , the only Apple Unified Platform. Mosyle is the only solution that integrates in a single professional-grade platform all the solutions necessary to seamlessly and automatically deploy, manage, and protect Apple devices at work. Over 45,000 organizations trust Mosyle to make millions of Apple devices work-ready with no effort and at an affordable cost. Request your EXTENDED TRIAL today and understand why Mosyle is everything you need to work with Apple . If you spend enough time managing Apple devices in an enterprise environment, you start to spot patterns in how security incidents happen. It is rarely a cinematic Ocean’s 11-style hack. Instead, it is usually a user delaying an iOS update for three months or an employee connecting to a
articles.title_zh: Apple @ Work：解析今年 Apple 設備面臨的頂級移動威脅
articles.summary_zh: Apple @ Work 由 Mosyle 獨家呈獻，Mosyle 是唯一的 Apple 統一平台，提供在單一專業級平台上無縫部署、管理和保護 Apple 工作設備所需的全部解決方案。

articles.title: Google explains why Android AICore occasionally takes up more storage
articles.summary: Android AICore lets you “run generative AI features directly on your Android phone or tablet’s hardware.” These models ( Gemini Nano ) are inherently large, but Google now has a more detailed explanation of why Android AICore storage occasionally spikes. more…
articles.title_zh: Google 解釋為何 Android AICore 偶爾會佔用更多存儲空間
articles.summary_zh: Android AICore 可讓用戶直接在 Android 手機或平板電腦硬件上運行生成式 AI 功能。Google 現已詳細解釋了 Android AICore 存儲偶爾激增的原因。

articles.title: Weekly poll results: the Honor 600 Pro overshadows the Honor 600
articles.summary: In Europe, the Honor 600 Pro is 43% more expensive than the vanilla model. However, in Malaysia, the upcharge is only 27% – and that makes a difference. The Pro was always the better phone between these two, the only question was whether its higher price was worth it. Memory Honor 600 Honor 600 Pro 12/256GB €650 - - MYR 3,100 12/512GB €700 MYR 2,600 €1,000 MYR 3,300 Based on last week’s poll, the answer is a resounding “yes”. Okay, the Honor 600 Pro is not the hottest new phone in town and price...
articles.title_zh: 每週投票結果：Honor 600 Pro 蓋過 Honor 600
articles.summary_zh: 在歐洲，Honor 600 Pro 比標準版貴 43%，但在馬來西亞則只貴 27%。Pro 版始終是更好的手機，唯一的問題是其更高的價格是否值得。

articles.title: Samsung Galaxy S26 Plus vs. Galaxy S25 Plus
articles.summary: After yet another modest upgrade, you might be wondering what would be the most sensible pick between the newly released Samsung Galaxy S26+ and the year-old Samsung Galaxy S25+. After all, it looks like the latter gets you a lot of the way there at a more reasonable starting price. But not everything becomes immediately apparent from the spec sheet alone. There are still some under-the-hood changes that need exploring. One example is the chipset. With the S26 series, Samsung is back to the dual-chip strategy for the majority of the markets, leaving places like Europe and South Korea with...
articles.title_zh: Samsung Galaxy S26 Plus vs. Galaxy S25 Plus
articles.summary_zh: 在又一次適度升級後，你可能在想新發布的 Samsung Galaxy S26+ 和一年前的 Samsung Galaxy S25+ 之間哪個是最明智的選擇。後者以更合理的起價為你提供了很多功能。

articles.title: Weekly deals: Nothing Phone (3) goes on sale, Galaxy S26 and Pixel 10 series also discounted
articles.summary: Mother’s Day is Sunday next week and we’re already seeing some shipping times slip to after the holiday. Most phones will still arrive on time, however. Admittedly, the Nothing Phone (3) probably won’t be mom’s first pick – but with a $200 discount, this Snapdragon 8s Gen 4 powered phone offers a good balance between performance and camera quality. It has a large 50MP 1/1.3” sensor in the main camera, a 50MP 3x telephoto camera, a 50MP ultra wide (114°) and a 50MP selfie camera. The phone has a 6.67” 10-bit OLED display on the front and the customizable Glyph Matrix on the back. It runs...
articles.title_zh: 每週優惠：Nothing Phone (3) 開始促銷，Galaxy S26 和 Pixel 10 系列也有折扣
articles.summary_zh: 母親節在下週日，我們已經看到某些運輸時間延遲到假期後。不過大多數手機仍會準時送達。Nothing Phone (3) 可能不是媽媽的首選，但這款搭載 Snapdragon 8s Gen 4 的手機有 $200 折扣，性價比不錯。

articles.title: Apple stops selling the M4 Mac Mini's 256GB storage model through its online store
articles.summary: Apple launched the M4 chip-powered Mac Mini in 2024, with its base model having 256GB of storage. This model went out of stock on Apple's online store last month in some countries, including the US, and has now been removed from Apple's website worldwide. As a result, the new base storage for the M4 Mac Mini on Apple's website is 512GB, which costs $799 with the default 16GB RAM option. There are two more RAM options - 24GB and 32GB. If you want more storage, you can upgrade to 1TB or 2TB. If you upgrade to the M4 Pro chip, you can get the Mac Mini with up to 64GB RAM and up to 8TB...
articles.title_zh: Apple 停止通過在線商店銷售 M4 Mac Mini 的 256GB 存儲模型
articles.summary_zh: Apple 在 2024 年推出了搭載 M4 芯片的 Mac Mini，基礎型號配有 256GB 存儲。該型號上月在包括美國在內的部分國家的 Apple 在線商店缺貨，現已從 Apple 網站全球下架。

articles.title: Xiaomi Civi 6, Civi 6 Pro's specs tipped
articles.summary: Xiaomi unveiled the Civi 5 Pro last May, so we are expecting the Chinese brand to launch its successor soon. We haven't heard anything about the Civi 6 Pro from Xiaomi yet, but when it arrives, it will have the Dimensity 9500 SoC under the hood. The word comes from reliable tipster Digital Chat Station, who also said that the Xiaomi Civi 6 Pro will pack a 6.83" 1.5K display and feature a 50MP periscope telephoto camera with 5x zoom. Xiaomi Civi 5 Pro Furthermore, DCS said that Xiaomi will also launch Civi 6, which will come with the Dimensity 8500 chip, a 6.59" 1.5K display, and...
articles.title_zh: Xiaomi Civi 6、Civi 6 Pro 規格曝光
articles.summary_zh: Xiaomi 於去年 5 月推出了 Civi 5 Pro，預計該品牌很快將推出其後續產品。據可靠爆料人 Digital Chat Station 稱，Civi 6 Pro 將搭載 Dimensity 9500 SoC。

articles.title: AI-generated actors and scripts are now ineligible for Oscars
articles.summary: Bad news for Tilly Norwood.
articles.title_zh: AI生成的演員和劇本現已不符合奧斯卡資格
articles.summary_zh: 對Tilly Norwood來說是個壞消息。

articles.title: The best AI dictation apps, tested and ranked
articles.summary: AI-powered dictation apps are useful for replying to emails, taking notes, and even coding through your voice
articles.title_zh: 最佳AI聽寫應用程式，測試和排名
articles.summary_zh: AI驅動的聽寫應用程式可用於回覆電子郵件、記筆記，甚至通過語音進行編碼。

articles.title: Inside OpenSearch’s bid to become the default AI data layer
articles.summary: Most of the engineering teams I work with started with open source OpenSearch for log analytics and enterprise search. But as their requirements have since shifted to semantic retrieval and agent memory, they’re now trying to figure out just how much of that AI application stack they can consolidate onto infrastructure they already run. The first quarter of 2026 has been very good news on that front. OpenSearch 3.5 and 3.6, which shipped in February and April, respectively, are worth understanding if you inherited an OpenSearch deployment and are now being asked to run agents on it. Here’s what to know. Dense and sparse vector search aren’t interchangeable Teams like to start with knn_vector , and that’s understandable. Point it at your embedding model’s outpu
articles.title_zh: OpenSearch 成為預設 AI 資料層的野心
articles.summary_zh: 許多工程團隊最初使用開源 OpenSearch 進行日誌分析和企業搜尋，但隨著需求轉向語義檢索和代理記憶體，他們正在探索可以在 OpenSearch 上整合多少 AI 應用程式堆疊。

articles.title: Malaysia’s Anti-Graft Agency to Quiz Ex-Minister Over Arm Deal
articles.summary: Malaysia’s anti-graft agency said it has summoned former economy minister Rafizi Ramli for questioning following a probe into a deal involving Arm Holdings Plc.
articles.title_zh: 馬來西亞反貪局將詢問前經濟部長有關Arm交易案
articles.summary_zh: 馬來西亞反貪局表示已傳喚前經濟部長Rafizi Ramli進行詢問，涉及對Arm Holdings Plc交易案的調查。

articles.title: Nvidia’s Push Into Physical AI Sparks Rally in Asian Partners
articles.summary: The list of Asian stocks that benefit from business partnership with Nvidia Corp. is getting longer, as the region further integrates into the AI chip giant’s business ecosystem.
articles.title_zh: Nvidia推進物理AI引發亞洲合作夥伴股市上漲
articles.summary_zh: 受惠於Nvidia Corp.商業合作的亞洲股票名單不斷擴大，該地區進一步整合到AI芯片巨頭的業務生態系統中。

articles.title: Actor Ben McKenzie Explores Cryptocurrency Fraud in Doc.
articles.summary: Actor Ben McKenzie, known for his role in The OC, discusses his transition from acting to investigating cryptocurrency through a new film he wrote and directed: Everyone Is Lying to You for Money. McKenzie explains to Bloomberg This Weekend's David Gura and Christina Ruffini he was motivated by pandemic boredom and a suggestion to buy Bitcoin. (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: 演員Ben McKenzie在紀錄片中探討加密貨幣詐騙
articles.summary_zh: 以《The OC》知名的演員Ben McKenzie討論了他從演員轉向調查加密貨幣的過程，他創作並執導了新紀錄片《Everyone Is Lying to You for Money》。

articles.title: Research roundup: 6 cool science stories we almost missed
articles.summary: It’s a regrettable reality that there is never enough time to cover all the interesting scientific stories we come across. So every month, we highlight a handful of the best stories that nearly slipped through the cracks. April’s list includes tracking Roman ship repairs, the discovery that mushrooms can detect human urine, crushing soda cans for science, and the physics of why dolphins can swim so fast. Physics of why dolphins swim so fast Dolphins are very good swimmers but the exact mechanisms by which they achieve their impressive speed and agility in water have remained murky. Japanese scientists from the University of Osaka ran multiple supercomputer simulations to learn more about how dolphins optimize their propulsion and found it has to do with the vortices, or eddies, produced by
articles.title_zh: 研究綜合報導：6則我們幾乎錯過的有趣科學故事
articles.summary_zh: 由於時間有限，無法報導所有有趣的科學故事，我們每月精選接近被忽略的最佳故事，四月名單包括羅馬船舶維修追蹤和蘑菇相關發現等。

articles.title: 【2026 企業資安大調查】一張圖看2026年一般製造業企業資安風險
articles.summary:
一般製造2026年的首要風險和次要風險，雖然和高科技製造業一項，但是一般製造業第一象限高衝擊高風險的項目，卻比高科技製造業還要更多，包括4項系統類風險和6項人員類風險和一項AI類的風險。
一般製造業今年也開始積極跟上生成式AI的浪潮，也願意投資在最新的AI代理應用上，但是一般製造業的AI因應能力沒有跟上來，像是AI負責任框架採用率偏低，AI治理程度也不高。企業資訊長和資安長也因此比高科技製造業更擔心生成式AI災情的發生。
立即下載完整報告【iThome 2026 CIO & CISO大調查】資安策略篇完整報告

一般製造業今年也開始積極跟上生成式AI的浪潮，也願意投資在最新的AI代理應用上，但是一般製造業的AI因應能力沒有跟上來，像是AI負責任框架採用率偏低，AI治理程度也不高。企業資訊長和資安長也因此比高科技製造業更擔心生成式AI災情的發生。
